name: Ghosts on Broomsticks
recipeInstructions:
1 Heat 2 inches of water to simmering, not boiling, in the bottom of a double boiler.
2 Place the white chocolate chips in the smaller pot and set it over the pot of simmering water.
3 Cook on low heat, stirring constantly until the chocolate is fully melted. Remove from the heat.
4 Cover two cookie sheets with waxed paper.
5 Arrange the wooden sticks on the waxed paper, 6 to a sheet.
6 Spoon ghost-shaped blobs of chocolate onto the paper, partially covering each stick.
7 Press 2 candies into each ghost for eyes.
8 Freeze ghosts for 15 minutes, or until hard.
